title: Fix multi-dim array pattern initialization (#2272) (#5601)
body:
This is a fix targeting #5601. Which was closed as a duplicate of #2272. But I think they are kind of different.

I'm not 100% this fix actually applies for #2272. The discussion on that ticket suggests changes to V3Simulate are needed.

In our use case the parameter array is constant, so this fix is just done during AST parsing to properly flatten the multi-dimension arrays.
